data.title: Create single-agent-integrate.md shared prompt
data.description: Create plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/single-agent-integrate.md. Trimmed variant of per-worktree-review-commit.md for single-agent fix-bug/debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode flows. Sequence: (1) verify WORKTREE_PATH!=ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT guard, (2) compute WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS via 'cd "$WORKTREE_PATH" && source ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/deps.sh && get_artifacts_dir', (3) auto-fix pass with cd $WORKTREE_PATH && prefix, (4) diff hash, (5) review tier, (6) dispatch code-reviewer (no isolation:worktree), (7) CONTEXT ANCHOR continuation guard after REVIEW_RESULT, (8) record-review.sh, (9) record-test-status.sh, (10) commit via COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md with cd $WORKTREE_PATH && prefix, (11) harvest from ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT: cd "$ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT" && .claude/scripts/dso harvest-worktree <branch> "$WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS", (12) cleanup from ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT. AC: test-single-agent-integrate-structure.sh all 9 assertions pass GREEN. testing_mode: RED
